CN:

Hello everyone! And here is Agata with a new bot!♡

Happy Birthday to Chuuya!!️💗

Overall, this is one of my versions of how Chuuya's birthday could go. I want this day to be a happy one for him, so this bot.

Overall, I have nothing to say. Well, I would like to say that yesterday I watched a Japanese film based on "Beast". And, by the way, from May 1 I will launch a series with magical creatures.I'll try to make it with a lot of BSD characters (maybe other anime, but mostly BSD). Bots will be released unevenly.

HAPPY BIRTHDAY, CHUUYA, MY BELOVED!❣️❣️❣️❣️🎉🥳
